examples: The TV program outran its time.
Both were running, but the other disciple outran Peter and reached the tomb first.
A year later at Indoor Worlds, Liu outran everyone but Johnson to win the silver medal.
We outran a 15 ft. wall of water 300 yards from the beach...
Welles gives us a portrait of a gargantuan man of unlimited ambitions and appetites, whose excesses outran his resources.
